---
title: "Review of John Inglesant"
---

## Review of John Inglesant

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1880?
**Genre:** literary criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Guardian, The</i>

### Notes

CMY refers to reviewing <i>John Inglesant</i> in <i>The Guardian</i> in a letter to Sir Walter Besant (?1899).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
